title: OSDUE Unicorn Animal Balloons Unicorn Theme Party Supplies, 3 PCS Unicorn Animal Birthday Decorations, Unicorn Fans Cute Ballons Kit for Shower Birthday Supplie
features: Amazing Animal Decorations - You will get 1 large pink unicorn, 1 purple pink unicorn, 1 large colorful unicorn; Cute and beautiful design, create a wonderful atmosphere for your party, Can also be used as an everyday decorations.

High Quality - Our unicorn animal balloons are made of high-quality aluminum film, thick and self-sealing, no leakage, if you need them to float, you can fill them with helium, and they can be used for a long time after inflating.Note: Not equipped with an air pump.
Unique Animal Head Shape - The balloons are smooth and bright. These animal head balloons will add elegance and specialness to your party, making your birthday party more eye-catching and wonderful.
Perfect Unicorn Theme Party Decorations - Design your own unique and different ocean animal party with our balloons, to make your unicorn themed party a big hit to your family.

Instructions - When filling, please do not overfill the metal mylar balloons and also avoid sunburn, overheating, sharp objects and excessive friction. If you find that the balloon is broken and leaking (very rare), please contact me immediately, I will provide you with a satisfactory solution.
